duration.Description: Duration of the event (measured from onset) in seconds.

trial_type.Description: Primary categorisation of each trial to identify them as instances of the experimental conditions.

Levels.congruent: threat-congruent trials, in which the arrow probe is presented in the previously vacated location of the angry face
Levels.incongruent: threat-incongruent trials, in which the arrow probe is presented in the previously vacated location of the neutral face
Levels.neutral: neutral trials, in which both faces presented in the pair were neutral to serve as a non-threat condition
